case_title: WEISS ERNESTINE VS CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL

docket_entries.description: MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY WEISS ERNESTINE AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-13-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 03
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF SERVED AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-13-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO OCT-28-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION OCT-28-1993, CONTINUED BY COURT TO NOV-10-1993 AT 08:00 AM IN DEPT 02

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF WEISS ERNESTINE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $40.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,540.00, $5000 LESS 50% CONTRIBUTORY NEGLIGENCE AND ASSUMP- TION OF RISK ON THE PART OF PLAINTIFF STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT CITY AND COUNTY OF SAN FRANCISCO MUNICIPAL RAILWAYPUBLIC UTILITY COMMISSION BUREAU OF CLAIMS AND CONTRACTS
